Class PersonBuilder<T extends Person>

java.lang.Object
src.productcreation.PersonBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of Person object to be built, must extend Person
All Implemented Interfaces:
Builder<T>
public class PersonBuilder<T extends Person> extends Object implements Builder<T>
Builder class for constructing Person objects with a fluent interface.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PersonBuilder(T person)
    Constructs a PersonBuilder initialized with the specified person.

  • Constructor Details

    • PersonBuilder

      public PersonBuilder(T person)
      Constructs a PersonBuilder initialized with the specified person.
      Parameters:
      person - the person object to be used as the base for building

  • Method Details

    • setName

      public PersonBuilder<T> setName(String name)
      Sets the name of the person.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to set
      Returns:
      this builder instance for method chaining

      public PersonBuilder<T> setHeight(long height)
      Sets the height of the person.
      Parameters:
      height - the height to set
      Returns:
      this builder instance for method chaining

      public PersonBuilder<T> setHairColor(Color hairColor)
      Sets the hair color of the person.
      Parameters:
      hairColor - the hair color to set
      Returns:
      this builder instance for method chaining

    • setNationality

      public PersonBuilder<T> setNationality(Country nationality)
      Sets the nationality of the person.
      Parameters:
      nationality - the nationality to set
      Returns:
      this builder instance for method chaining

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the builder to its initial state. Currently does nothing as the builder uses an existing person reference.
      Specified by:
      reset in interface Builder<T extends Person>

    • create

      public T create()
      Returns the constructed person object.
      Specified by:
      create in interface Builder<T extends Person>
      Returns:
      the built person of type T
